title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE DENNIS MOLINTAS MUNICIPAL HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BOKOD, PROVINCE OF BENGUET, TO DENNIS MOLINTAS MEMORIAL HOSPITAL

chunks.text:
H. No. 21418 / 85 OG No. 51, 58 Supp (Dec. 18, 1989)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6771, November 29, 1989 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE DENNIS MOLINTAS MUNICIPAL HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BOKOD, PROVINCE OF BENGUET, TO DENNIS MOLINTAS MEMORIAL HOSPITAL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Dennis Molintas Municipal Hospital in the Municipality of Bokod, Province of Benguet, is hereby changed to Dennis Molintas Memorial Hospital.

SEC. 2. Any amount necessary for the implementation of this Act shall be charged to the appropriations of the Department of Health.

SEC. 2. Any amount necessary for the implementation of this Act shall be charged to the appropriations of the Department of Health.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JOVITO R. SALONGA

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on June 8, 1989 and September 15, 1989, respectively.

(Sgd.) EDWIN P. ACOBA

(Sgd.) QUIRINO D. ABAD SANTOS, JR.

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary of the House of Representatives

Approved: November 29, 1989

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
